title: ESM Packaging, Exports, Executable Entry, Artifact Inspection, and Platform Support
description: The command runs only through tsx in the source tree, package exports expose internals, the bin entry points at TypeScript, files include fixtures and secrets, and support claims ignore Node and OS behavior. Learners cumulatively produce installable inspected Node Pokedex package through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define package type, source and output roots, explicit extensions, imports, exports, internal boundaries, and supported Node resolution.
Publish an executable JavaScript entry with portable launcher behavior, thin process wiring, correct permissions, and no source-tree assumptions.
Use package files or ignore rules, inspect npm pack output, include license and docs, exclude secrets and residue, and verify dependency provenance.
